raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX, a fraudulent balance transfer of {$1000.00} was posted to my Barclays credit card. I noticed it on my statement and immediately reported it. Barclays initially removed the charge in XXXX but then placed it back on my account in XX/XX/XXXX. I have repeatedly requested removal of the charge, reversal of fees/interest, and investigation details. Over the past 10 months, Barclays has not resolved the issue. Customer service repeatedly transfers me, keeps me on hold, and then hangs up. I called again today with no luck. This ongoing issue has harmed my credit history and caused significant stress.
